mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_APPLICATION_HISTORY ( HISTORY_ID, FK_APPLICATION_ID, PREV_STATUS, NEW_STATUS, CHANGED_AT ) VALUES ( seq_application_history_id.NEXTVAL, #{applicationId}, #{prevStatus}, #{newStatus}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.application_id AS applicationId, A.fk_job_id AS jobId, A.fk_memberid AS memberId, A.fk_submitted_resume_id AS submittedResumeId,
A.name AS name, A.birth_date AS birthDate, A.gender AS gender, A.phone AS phone, A.email AS email,
A.application_round AS applicationRound, A.application_status AS applicationStatus, A.process_status AS processStatus, DECODE(A.process_status, 0, '미열람', 1, '열람', 2, '서류탈락', 3, '면접요청', 4, '합격', 5, '불합격') AS processStatusText, A.applied_at AS appliedAt, A.cancelled_at AS cancelledAt, A.viewed_at AS viewedAt,
J.title AS postTitle, C.company_name AS companyName, S.title AS resumeTitle, R.region_name AS regionName, JC.category_name AS categoryName, J.work_type AS workType, J.salary AS salary, J.deadline_at AS deadlineAt,
S.self_intro AS selfIntro, S.education AS education, S.career AS career, S.language AS language, S.portfolio AS portfolio, S.award AS award, S.address AS address, S.photo_path AS photoPath, S.desired_salary AS desiredSalary FROM tbl_job_application A JOIN tbl_job_posting J ON A.fk_job_id = J.job_id JOIN tbl_company C ON J.fk_memberid = C.fk_memberid JOIN tbl_submitted_resume S ON A.fk_submitted_resume_id = S.submitted_resume_id LEFT JOIN tbl_region R ON J.fk_region_code = R.region_code LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON J.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE A.application_id = #{applicationId} AND J.fk_memberid = #{memberId}

SELECT file_id AS fileId, target_id AS targetId, target_type AS targetType, filecategory AS fileCategory, file_url AS fileUrl, original_filename AS originalFilename FROM tbl_image_file WHERE target_id = #{applicationId} AND target_type = 'application' ORDER BY file_id

SELECT S.skill_name AS "skillName", AT.proficiency AS "proficiency" FROM tbl_application_techstack AT JOIN tbl_skill S ON AT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE AT.fk_submitted_resume_id = #{submittedResumeId} ORDER BY S.skill_name

SELECT C.certificate_name AS "certificateName", C.issuer AS "issuer", TO_CHAR(AC.acquired_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "acquiredDate" FROM tbl_application_certificate AC JOIN tbl_certificate C ON AC.fk_certificate_code = C.certificate_code WHERE AC.fk_submitted_resume_id = #{submittedResumeId} ORDER BY AC.acquired_date DESC
